summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 are well implemented. REQ-3 (backend approveUpiPayment defensive checks and Result<Text,Text> return type) is not clearly evidenced in the diff — the backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show the approveUpiPayment method being modified to return a structured Result type or having defensive input validation added.

missing_requirements.requirement: approveUpiPayment in backend/main.mo should return Result<Text, Text> instead of trapping, validate non-empty input parameters, and remove any logic that could cause unexpected traps or canister stops.
missing_requirements.reason: The diff for backend/main.mo is truncated and does not show the approveUpiPayment method at all. There is no evidence that the method signature was changed to return Result<Text, Text>, that input validation was added, or that defensive patterns were applied. The only backend changes visible are an import of Migration and use of MixinStorage/MixinAuthorization mixins, none of which relate to approveUpiPayment.

hallucinated_features.description: A backend/migration.mo module was added with a run function for state migration.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module or any migration logic. This is an additional file not requested in any of the three requirements.
